content.en:
Deep in the Temple.

A True Ancestor cultivated here, and each True Ancestor was very powerful, and the best of them had even reached the top True Ancestor level.

They are all guardians of the temple, not only have high requirements for talent and potential, but also have extremely high requirements for character, and anyone who is a little worse in character or not strong enough is not qualified to become a guardian of the human race.

The Terran Guardians are not well-known and may not seem to be a good job, but they are well treated, enjoying a lot of resources from the Terrans, and the best of them will be given forbidden curiosities.

Abrupt.

A True Ancestor came here and said, "Guardians, the Emperor Fengyang of the Heavenly Emperor Palace has come to provoke the Terrans, at present, the Terrans do not have the strongest True Ancestor to fight, Qin Tiandao Ancestor asks the Guardian Masters to send the Supreme True Ancestor to raise the power of our Terran Race!"

"Qin Tian asked us to fight with the Invincible True Ancestor, are we going to be beaten?"

One of the Guardians joked.

"I'll go, I'll be beaten anyway, but we must also prove that our Terran has strength, otherwise even a Supreme True Ancestor won't appear, I'm afraid the outside world will ridicule our Terran!"

One of the Guardians spoke.

He is An Lan True Ancestor among the guardians, and he once served as Ye Xingchen's secret guard, and not long ago he also reached the level of the strongest True Ancestor, and he is the strongest of the guardians.

Anlan True Ancestor walked out of the retreat space and came to the outside of the temple.

......

"It turns out that your human race has a supreme true ancestor, come up!"

Emperor Fengyang saw An Lan True Ancestor and despised Dao.

An Lan True Ancestor knew that his strength could not be the opponent of Emperor Fengyang, so after entering the field, he directly displayed his strongest Xiaoqian Dao technique, the Xiaotiangang Sword!

It's a sword qi technique!

Burst!!!!

Xiao Tiangang's sword instantly slashed towards the Emperor of Fengyang, but was caught by Emperor Fengyang with one hand.

Bang!

The sword qi collapsed, but the Fengyang Emperor's hand did not have any scars, as if the tofu had collided with the stone.

"It's too weak!"

Emperor Fengyang sighed.

Instantly, he struck An Lan True Ancestor with a single punch, sending it flying out and crashing into the temple.

Qin Tian Dao Ancestor was furious and clenched his fists.

Obviously said that it is good to suppress the strength of the competition, this is the suppression of the strength?

If someone else is a top True Ancestor, you will suppress the Supreme True Ancestor, and if someone else is a Supreme True Ancestor, you will suppress the top Supreme True Ancestor.

Is this called repression?

But he didn't dare to question Emperor Fengyang, because the human race couldn't afford to provoke the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and they couldn't afford to provoke Emperor Fengyang.

Standing behind the Fengyang Emperor was a group of Dao Ancestors, all of whom were above the strength of the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestors, and the most powerful Thunder Cloud Dao Ancestor had reached the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

Among the human races, Ye Tian is not out, and no one is their opponent.

"Who else?"

Emperor Fengyang said in high spirits.

All the geniuses of the human race didn't dare to move, no one just came on the field, after all, they had to be beaten when they played, who wanted to?

As for the inheritance of the Thousand Dao Technique, it is just fishing for the moon in the water, and it can't be seen and touched.

After a long time, no one played.

"It seems that the Terrans don't have any geniuses, so I'd better leave!"

Emperor Fengyang said in a low voice.

But the people present are all strong people above the True Ancestor, and no matter how small the voice is, others can hear it very clearly.

A strong man of the personal race was angry, but helpless.

Just then, a voice came.

"Emperor Fengyang, I'll challenge you!"

As soon as the words fell, a young man tore through the void and descended.

Seeing this person, Qin Tiandao Ancestor was overjoyed.

"It's the Star True Ancestor!"

Qin Tian Dao Ancestor is a few people who know the strength of the Star True Ancestor, this is because of the invincible True Ancestor!

However, the status of the Xingchen True Ancestor was too high, and he did not dare to invite the Xingchen True Ancestor.

"You are Ye Xingchen, the true ancestor of the human race?"

Emperor Fengyang also recognized Ye Xingchen.

Before, Ye Xingchen traveled all over the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and he also had some reputation, plus Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue shone in the Forbidden Forest at the beginning, and they surpassed countless True Ancestors with the strength of the younger generation.

Although the Heavenly Emperor Palace had not yet been born at that time, it also collected information in this regard.

In his impression, Ye Xingchen was still at the level of the strongest true ancestor, even if his strength was greatly improved, he might not be able to enter the invincible true ancestor.

Moreover, the ordinary Invincible True Ancestor was only a weak person in his eyes.

But at this moment, Ye Xingchen standing there actually brought him a trace of pressure.

"How is it possible, I am the ultimate powerhouse of the Invincible True Ancestor, what is he Ye Xingchen, how can it cause pressure on me?"

Emperor Fengyang forcibly calmed down, and he couldn't see any mood swings on the surface, but there was a sense of tension in his heart.

"Let's go fight above, there's too little space here!"

Ye Xingchen proposed.

"Good!"

Emperor Fengyang nodded.

Whew!!

Ye Tian continued to fly towards the sky, until he flew above the Endless Void.

The sea here is boundless, and no matter how much you fight, it will not reach the territory of the Terrans.

Emperor Fengyang knew that Ye Xingchen was an invincible true ancestor, so he no longer suppressed much strength, and as soon as he made a move, it was a Thousand Dao Technique-Great Sun Golden Light Technique!

Rumble!!!

A golden light containing the phantom of the Great Sun instantly slashed towards Ye Xingchen, this terrifying power could make the expressions of the Terran genius True Ancestors who had been on the scene change drastically, if they were allowed to face such an attack, they would melt and fall to death in an instant.

In the face of the Thousand Dao Technique of the Emperor of Fengyang, Ye Xingchen performed his own defensive Thousand Dao Technique-Xingchen Dao Clothes!

This is a very famous Xingchen Zhongqian Dao Technique, and Ye Xingchen relied on his defensive Dao-level natal talent - Xingchen Armor, as well as many treasures to improve his understanding, so he easily cultivated Xingchen Dao Yi to the peak realm of Xiaocheng, which is also his only Zhongqian Dao technique of the peak realm of Xiaocheng, and other Dao techniques are basically at the Xiaocheng or entry level.

Xingchen Dao clothes are very gorgeous, like a beautiful piece of clothing on the body.

I saw that the golden light of the Great Sun Golden Light Technique Xingchen bombarded the Xingchen Dao Clothes, and it collapsed directly, and it couldn't break through Ye Xingchen's defense at all.

"Zhongqian Dao Technique - Xingchen Dao Clothes, and it has also reached the realm of Xiaocheng!"

Emperor Fengyang frowned.

Ye Xingchen had such a terrifying defense, and his strength seemed to have reached the extreme of the Invincible True Ancestor, it was a little difficult for him to defeat Ye Xingchen.

But then, Ye Xingchen showed the forbidden body of the Xiaocheng realm, and he was completely shocked, although he had just been tempered to forty percent, it was far from being comparable to the ordinary forbidden body.

What's more, Emperor Fengyang doesn't have a forbidden body, he is just a true ancestor with the power of a special secret technique that contains a trace of forbidden attributes, far from controlling the power of dark taboos, let alone having a forbidden body.

At this moment, Emperor Fengyang's jealousy completely exploded!
